mapper.sql: a.id, a.name, a.comments, a.comments_en AS "commentsEn", a.table_type AS "tableType", a.class_name AS "className", a.parent_table AS "parentTable", a.parent_table_fk AS "parentTableFk", a.create_by AS "createBy.id", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_by AS "updateBy.id", a.update_date AS "updateDate", a.remarks, a.del_flag AS "delFlag", a.issync AS "isSync", a.ext_jsp AS "extJsp", a.ext_js AS "extJs", a.ext_java AS "extJava", a.is_custom AS "isCustom", a.is_build_add AS "isBuildAdd", a.is_build_edit AS "isBuildEdit", a.is_build_del AS "isBuildDel", a.is_build_import AS "isBuildImport", a.is_build_operate AS "isBuildOperate", a.datasource, a.is_version AS "isVersion", a.is_process_definition AS "isProcessDefinition", a.process_definition_category AS "processDefinitionCategory", a.is_build_xform AS "isBuildXform", a.is_build_secret AS "isBuildSecret", a.is_build_content AS "isBuildContent", a.form_type AS "formType", a.scount AS "scount", a.mcount AS "mcount", a.lcount AS "lcount", a.dcount AS "dcount", a.is_release AS "isRelease", a.is_mobile AS "isMobile", a.sql_columns AS "sqlColumns", a.sql_columns_friendly AS "sqlColumnsFriendly", a.sql_joins AS "sqlJoins", a.sql_insert AS "sqlInsert", a.sql_update AS "sqlUpdate", a.sql_sort AS "sqlSort", a.mobile_icon AS "mobileIcon", a.is_scroll AS "isScroll", a.is_rowedit AS "isRowedit", a.is_build_export AS "isBuildExport", a.export_list AS "exportList", a.export_template_path AS "exportTemplatePath", a.export_rule_name AS "exportRuleName", a.import_list AS "importList", a.import_template_file AS "importTemplateFile", a.export_template_file AS "exportTemplateFile", a.blockchain_param1 AS "blockChainParam1", a.blockchain_param2 AS "blockChainParam2", a.blockchain_param3 AS "blockChainParam3", a.blockchain_param4 AS "blockChainParam4", a.blockchain_param5 AS "blockChainParam5", a.blockchain_param6 AS "blockChainParam6", a.module AS "module", a.ext_sql01 AS "extSql01", a.ext_sql02 AS "extSql02", a.sql_columns_friendly_ext AS "sqlColumnsFriendlyExt", a.sql_joins_ext AS "sqlJoinsExt", a.form_no_ext AS "formNoExt", a.form_props AS "formProps", a.extend_js AS "extendJs", a.table_sort AS "tableSort", a.pk_column_name AS "pkColumnName", (case when exists(select 1 from gen_table b where b.parent_table = a.name) then 1 else 0 end) AS "hasChildren"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gen_table( id, name, comments, comments_en, table_type, class_name, parent_table, parent_table_fk, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, remarks, del_flag, issync, ext_jsp, ext_js, ext_java, is_custom, is_build_add, is_build_edit, is_build_del, is_build_import, is_build_operate, datasource, is_version, is_process_definition, process_definition_category, is_build_xform, is_build_secret, is_build_content, form_type, scount, mcount, lcount, dcount, is_release, is_mobile, sql_columns, sql_columns_friendly, sql_joins, sql_insert, sql_update, sql_sort, mobile_icon, is_scroll, is_rowedit, is_build_export, export_list, export_template_path, export_rule_name, import_list, import_template_file, export_template_file, blockchain_param1, blockchain_param2, blockchain_param3, blockchain_param4, blockchain_param5, blockchain_param6, module, ext_sql01, ext_sql02, sql_columns_friendly_ext, sql_joins_ext, form_no_ext, form_props, extend_js, table_sort, pk_column_name ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{comments}, #{commentsEn}, #{tableType}, #{className}, #{parentTable}, #{parentTableFk}, #{createBy.id}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy.id}, #{updateDate}, #{remarks}, #{delFlag}, #{isSync}, #{extJsp}, #{extJs}, #{extJava}, #{isCustom}, #{isBuildAdd}, #{isBuildEdit}, #{isBuildDel}, #{isBuildImport}, #{isBuildOperate}, #{datasource}, #{isVersion}, #{isProcessDefinition}, #{processDefinitionCategory}, #{isBuildXform}, #{isBuildSecret}, #{isBuildContent}, #{formType}, #{scount}, #{mcount}, #{lcount}, #{dcount}, #{isRelease}, #{isMobile}, #{sqlColumns}, #{sqlColumnsFriendly}, #{sqlJoins}, #{sqlInsert}, #{sqlUpdate}, #{sqlSort}, #{mobileIcon}, #{isScroll}, #{isRowedit}, #{isBuildExport}, #{exportList}, #{exportTemplatePath}, #{exportRuleName}, #{importList}, #{importTemplateFile}, #{exportTemplateFile}, #{blockChainParam1}, #{blockChainParam2}, #{blockChainParam3}, #{blockChainParam4}, #{blockChainParam5}, #{blockChainParam6}, #{module}, #{extSql01}, #{extSql02}, #{sqlColumnsFriendlyExt}, #{sqlJoinsExt}, #{formNoExt}, #{formProps}, #{extendJs}, #{tableSort}, #{pkColumnName} )
mapper.update: UPDATE gen_table SET name = #{name}, comments = #{comments}, comments_en = #{commentsEn}, table_type = #{tableType}, class_name = #{className}, parent_table = #{parentTable}, parent_table_fk = #{parentTableFk}, update_by = #{updateBy.id}, update_date = #{updateDate}, remarks = #{remarks}, issync = #{isSync}, ext_jsp = #{extJsp}, ext_js = #{extJs}, ext_java = #{extJava}, is_custom = #{isCustom}, is_build_add = #{isBuildAdd}, is_build_edit = #{isBuildEdit}, is_build_del = #{isBuildDel}, is_build_import = #{isBuildImport}, is_build_operate = #{isBuildOperate}, datasource = #{datasource}, is_version = #{isVersion}, is_process_definition = #{isProcessDefinition}, process_definition_category = #{processDefinitionCategory}, is_build_xform = #{isBuildXform}, is_build_secret = #{isBuildSecret}, is_build_content = #{isBuildContent}, form_type = #{formType}, scount = #{scount}, mcount = #{mcount}, lcount = #{lcount}, dcount = #{dcount}, is_release = #{isRelease}, is_mobile = #{isMobile}, sql_columns = #{sqlColumns}, sql_columns_friendly = #{sqlColumnsFriendly}, sql_joins = #{sqlJoins}, sql_insert = #{sqlInsert}, sql_update = #{sqlUpdate}, sql_sort = #{sqlSort}, mobile_icon = #{mobileIcon}, is_scroll = #{isScroll}, is_rowedit = #{isRowedit}, is_build_export = #{isBuildExport}, export_list = #{exportList}, export_template_path = #{exportTemplatePath}, export_rule_name = #{exportRuleName}, import_list = #{importList}, import_template_file = #{importTemplateFile}, export_template_file = #{exportTemplateFile}, blockchain_param1 = #{blockChainParam1}, blockchain_param2 = #{blockChainParam2}, blockchain_param3 = #{blockChainParam3}, blockchain_param4 = #{blockChainParam4}, blockchain_param5 = #{blockChainParam5}, blockchain_param6 = #{blockChainParam6}, module = #{module}, form_props = #{formProps}, extend_js = #{extendJs}, table_sort = #{tableSort}, pk_column_name = #{pkColumnName} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS "id", a.name AS "name", a.comments AS "comments", a.comments_en AS "commentsEn", a.table_type AS "tableType", a.parent_table AS "parentTable", a.parent_table_fk AS "parentTableFk", a.is_mobile AS "isMobile", a.mobile_icon AS "mobileIcon", a.process_definition_category AS "processDefinitionCategory", a.is_scroll AS "isScroll", a.is_build_secret AS "isBuildSecret", a.is_rowedit AS "isRowedit", a.is_build_import AS "isBuildImport", a.is_build_export AS "isBuildExport", a.export_list AS "exportList", a.export_template_path AS "exportTemplatePath", a.export_rule_name AS "exportRuleName", a.import_list AS "importList", a.import_template_file AS "importTemplateFile", a.export_template_file AS "exportTemplateFile", a.ext_jsp AS "extJsp", a.ext_js AS "extJs", a.ext_java AS "extJava", a.is_custom AS "isCustom", a.blockchain_param1 AS "blockChainParam1", a.blockchain_param2 AS "blockChainParam2", a.blockchain_param3 AS "blockChainParam3", a.blockchain_param4 AS "blockChainParam4", a.blockchain_param5 AS "blockChainParam5", a.blockchain_param6 AS "blockChainParam6", a.module AS "module", a.is_version AS "isVersion", a.form_props AS "formProps", a.extend_js AS "extendJs", a.table_sort AS "tableSort", a.pk_column_name AS "pkColumnName" FROM gen_table a WHERE a.id = #{id}
SELECT a.id AS "id", a.name AS "key", a.table_sort AS "tableSort" FROM gen_table a WHERE a.table_type != '4' AND a.parent_table = #{name}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM gen_table a WHERE a.name = #{name}
